name: Stir-Fried Greens with Oyster Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp Cornstarch dissolved in 1/4 cup Water
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the vegetables.
2. Cut leafy greens into 2-inch lengths.
3. Heat the wok in oil over high heat and add the garlic.
4. Stir-fry until it is light brown, then add the greens and seasonings.
5. Stir-fry for 3 to 5 minutes more.
6. Transfer to a serving dish, sprinkle with cilantro, and serve hot.
VARIATION: In place of the collards, use mustard greens, bok choy, or broccoli.
